<!-- Custom instructions for Bloom IDE project -->

## Project Overview

This is a React 18 application with TypeScript and Vite, offering fast development and optimized production builds.

## Setup Complete

✅ React Vite project scaffolded with TypeScript
✅ Latest dependencies installed (React 18, Vite 8, TypeScript 6)
✅ Project configured and tested
✅ Build verified successfully

## Quick Start

```bash
# Install dependencies (already done)
npm install

# Start development server
npm run dev

# Build for production
npm run build

# Preview production build
npm run preview
```

## Development Server

Run `npm run dev` to start the Vite development server at `http://localhost:5173` with Hot Module Replacement (HMR).

## Key Dependencies

- **react** (^18.0.0)
- **react-dom** (^18.0.0)
- **typescript** (~6.0.2)
- **vite** (^8.0.12)
- **@vitejs/plugin-react** (for React JSX support)

## Project Structure

- `src/App.tsx` - Main component
- `src/main.tsx` - Application entry point
- `vite.config.ts` - Vite configuration with React plugin
- `tsconfig.json` - TypeScript configuration with JSX support

## Available Scripts

- `npm run dev` - Start development server
- `npm run build` - Build for production
- `npm run preview` - Preview production build locally
